qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with minimum 55% marks or Post Graduate in any discipline preferably CAIIB or MBA, C.A.
qualification.details: Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager under Officer Grade -E: Graduate with minimum 55% marks or Post Graduate in any discipline preferably CAIIB or MBA, C.A. Minimum four (4) years experience in Banking in similar Officers Grade or above.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager under Officer Grade -E

salary_details.details: Scale of Pay: Rs.31,630.00-Rs.82,290.00 Grade Pay: Rs.7,900.00 Allowances: DA, HRA, Medical Allowance etc. as admissible.

selection_process: Shortlisting as per eligibility criteria Direct Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.acab.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates with a minimum of 55% marks or possess a Post Graduate degree in any discipline. Preference will be given to those with CAIIB, MBA, or CA qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 28 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager positions.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 25 vacancies for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager post under Officer Grade-E in the Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 1000/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary scale for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary on the scale of Rs. 31,630.00 to Rs. 82,290.00, with a Grade Pay of Rs. 7,900.00, plus admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required experience for the Assistant Branch Manager / Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: A minimum of four years of experience in Banking in a similar Officers Grade or above is required for this position.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection process steps?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on eligibility criteria, followed by a direct personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Assam Co-operative Apex Bank Ltb, which is www.acab.bank.in.
